title: Fazbear Rising
description: Brings the world of FNAF to minecraft in it's style!
body: Fazbear Rising is a fan-made mod based on the popular horror game Five Nights at Freddy’s. The mod introduces new animatronics, environments, and terrifying gameplay twists that expand the FNaF universe. Players must survive each night while uncovering hidden lore unique to Fazbear Rising. With enhanced graphics and custom mechanics, this mod brings a fresh, chilling experience for FNaF fans.
